title: Luffy Decides to Free Zoro
description: On pages 9–12, this part pushes the Shells Town conflict forward as Luffy challenges the fear surrounding Morgan’s Marines.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: NO... I, uh... she was just a little girl and I...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: SHE DIDN'T EVEN KNOW WHAT SHE WAS DOING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: YOU! Find her and kill her!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Child or not, ANYONE who defies me must suffer the penalty!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: BUT, CAPTAIN, SHE'S JUST A LITTLE GIRL...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wouldn't obey such a cruel order!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: OH, WOULDN'T YOU? YOU ARE A LEUTENANT IN THE MANY AREN'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND I-- A CAPTAIN-- AM YOUR SUPERIOR OFFICER, AM I NOT?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Uh... yes sir....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Then you are duty- bound to obey me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If I say kill her, then you will kill her!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I WON'T MURDER A LITTLE GIRL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: MUTINY!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AFAA.A.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: YOU DIDN'T HAVE TO KILL HIM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: LUEITENANT!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No matter. The towns- folk must be taught RESPECT.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'll handle it personally!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: FOR YEARS I LABORED TO ACHIEVE THIS RANK, AND I DID IT BY MY OWN STRENETH... AT GREAT PERSONAL COST!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Rank means EVERYTHING in this world, remember that!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: My rank is the highest on this base...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: WHICH MAKES ME SUPERIOR TO EVERYONE ELSE HERE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That means everything I do is right!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that clear?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes sir!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: YOU ARE THE GREATEST, SIR!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THIS IS A MONUMENT TO MY RANK AND POWER!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It took years to build, but today it is finally complete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: RAISE MY STATE! PUT IT AT THE HIGHEST POINT OF THIS FORTRESS AS A SYMBOL OF MY GREATNESS!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THAT'S FUNNY... THERE AREN'T ANY SAILORS AROUND...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: MAYBE THEY'RE HAVING A MEETING OR SOME- THING...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No one to help me find Zolo's swords...

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
